name: Start Dockerd
description: Launch dockerd via nohup. The pre-baked debian-docker LXC base has docker installed but no init system, so we start the daemon directly. 330-svc-start-docker-compose polls for readiness afterwards. The script also wires project-level registry mirrors into /etc/docker/daemon.json (Docker Hub), the LXC nameservers as `dns` upstream in daemon.json (avoids embedded-DNS forwarding glitches in nested LXC-Docker setups), and /etc/hosts (ghcr.io) when the corresponding project defaults are set.
